title: Foo Bar ClickHouse ORDER BY Optimization
description: A ClickHouse table has a suboptimal ORDER BY that causes full scans for common query patterns. Redesign the ORDER BY key to match filter columns (region, event_ts) and improve query latency.

tasks.description: Recreate or alter analytics.events so ORDER BY matches the common filters (region, event_ts). Queries filtering by region and date range should run under 100ms.

infrastructure.description: ClickHouse with analytics.events (2M rows). ORDER BY tuple() causes full scans. Queries filter by region and event_ts.
